attachments.fallback: How to Convert CSV Files to VCF? - @elijahbennett
attachments.text: To convert CSV files to VCF, there are multiple solutions available on the internet. But the difficult task is to finding the right one for the conversion of CSV contact lists to vCard. If you a reliable one, then I have a perfect solution for you I recommend using the GainTools Address Book Manager tool. This tool can simply the conversion process for you and also make it reliable.
